name: wisedrive-api-contracts
description: Wisedrive Platform API Contracts - Single source of truth for all APIs

scripts.generate:typescript: npx openapi-generator-cli generate -i openapi/wisedrive-api-v1.yaml -g typescript-axios -o generated/typescript --additional-properties=supportsES6=true,npmName=@wisedrive/api-client,npmVersion=1.0.0
scripts.generate:python: npx openapi-generator-cli generate -i openapi/wisedrive-api-v1.yaml -g python -o generated/python --additional-properties=packageName=wisedrive_api
scripts.generate:kotlin: npx openapi-generator-cli generate -i openapi/wisedrive-api-v1.yaml -g kotlin -o generated/kotlin --additional-properties=packageName=com.wisedrive.api
scripts.generate:swift: npx openapi-generator-cli generate -i openapi/wisedrive-api-v1.yaml -g swift5 -o generated/swift
scripts.generate:all: npm run generate:typescript && npm run generate:python && npm run generate:kotlin && npm run generate:swift

author: Wisedrive Platform Team
